prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-27INCHSLUICENBUCKETKIT-18PC-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 18PC Complete Gold Prospecting Kit with Flared Aluminum Sluice Box and (3) Classifier Screens Description: Increase your gold recovery, while reducing river side set up time and effort with ASR Outdoor 27 Inch Flared Aluminum Sluice Box with 5 Gallon Bucket Complete Gold Panning Kit. With a uniquely designed, flared mouth gold sluice box and well curated assortment of prospecting tools, this gold panning kit has everything needed for collection, recovery and storage of gold.

And, while the 27 inch folding sluice and 5 gallon bucket make this gold panning kit incredibly portable, the gold prospecting equipment we've included ensures you're never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field. So, how is this kit going to cover end to end processing? Let's start with the 5 gallon bucket and classifier screens (1/2, 1/8 and 1/12 inch included).

The 5 gallon bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with stackable sifting screens; when layered on top of the bucket, you've now created an effective classification system to remove unwanted material from your pay dirt concentrate. Use the uniquely sized and easily portable 28 inch shovel we've included to collect material for processing. But, before you start panning or sluicing with your classified pay dirt, use the 16lb magnetic separator pick up tool; this will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials from your classified pay dirt, making it easier to extract gold.

Whether you choose to feed your river sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you've got both options with this kit. With a uniquely designed flared mouth opening, the design of this 27 inch fixed gold sluice box will allow more water capacity suspension to flow through the entire channel of the sluice box. The sluice box comes with preinstalled rubber matting, carpet, miners moss, angled aluminum mesh and large 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles to help trap gold. And, weighing in at just 4 Search Terms: Gold rush mealworm soil sifter sluice boxes for gold prospecting gifts for Dad gold mining equipment gold panning kit for adults snuffer bottle gold pans gold classifiers miners moss gold panning kit with sluice box gold panning Features: - GOLD RUSH READY: This 18pc gold panning kit includes everything you need for collection, recovery and storage of gold! And, saving you time and effort, all the gold panning equipment included comes preassembled and ready to use right out of the box - GOLD SLUICE BOX: Compact aluminum body 27 inch sluice box that enhances water capacity suspension through the entire channel, via a uniquely designed flared mouth; includes shoulder strap, light weight and easily portable - 5 GALLON BUCKET: Designed to work seamlessly with the included sifting screens, stack them on top of the bucket to create an effective material classification system that readies your pay dirt concentrate for gold panning or feeding a sluice box - GOLD PROSPECTING TOOLS: This gold panning kit also includes a 16lb black sand magnetic separator tool, 4oz snuffer bottles, (4) traditional gold pans, (3) classifier screens, 28 inch shovel, prospecting scoop, magnifying tweezers and glass storage vials - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 27 x 14 x 14 inches; Weight: 7.40lbs; Sluice Box Weight: 4.80lbs; Channel Width: 9.25 inches; Flare Width: 10.75 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
